key.name: widgets
key.description: Stores the JSON representation of all active widgets.

key.name: border-radius
key.description: The corner rounding radius of the widgets.

key.name: global-border-width
key.description: Default border width for all widgets.

key.name: global-border-color
key.description: Default border color for all widgets.

key.name: global-background-color
key.description: Default background color for all widgets.

key.name: global-foreground-color
key.description: Default foreground/text color for all widgets.

key.name: show-grid
key.description: Visualize the underlying widget placement grid.

key.name: global-font-family
key.description: The font family to use across widgets.

key.name: weather-dynamic-color
key.description: Change the background color of weather widgets based on the current condition and time of day.

key.name: weather-dynamic-image
key.description: Show a weather-specific overlay image based on the current condition.

key.name: image-animate-gif
key.description: If true, animated GIFs will play. If false, only their first frame is rendered.

key.name: weather-city
key.description: The configured default city for weather widgets.

key.name: weather-use-fahrenheit
key.description: If true, weather widgets will display temperatures in Fahrenheit instead of Celsius by default.

key.name: time-format-24h
key.description: If true, time widgets will display the time in 24-hour format instead of 12-hour format.

key.name: image-show-caption
key.description: If true, show captions on image widgets.

key.name: slideshow-show-caption
key.description: If true, show captions on slideshow widgets.
